title: Cooling Gym Powder for Men – 3 Pack 170 g Each | 100% Talc‑Free & Anti Chafing with Menthol, Bergamot & Cedarwood | Men’s Talcum Powder U by Great British Home
features: Pack of three 170 g bottles of men’s talcum powder, designed for gym, running, cycling and workouts.
Specialised cooling powder that absorbs excess moisture and helps reduce friction in high‑sweat zones (underarms, groins, thighs).
Also reduces discomfort from gripping weights — handling dumbbells, kettlebells and gym apparatus becomes more comfortable.
100 % talc free body powder formulation — suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, and useful before, during and after training.
Ideal for active men seeking a trusted anti chafing powder or anti sweat powder—keep skin dry, comfortable and ready to perform.
description: For men who train hard, sweat, lift and move—stay dry, comfortable and confident with Invigor8 Cooling Gym Powder for Men. This 3‑pack bundle (3 × 170 g) provides a high‑performance body powder designed to tackle friction, irritation and moisture where it matters most: underarms, groins, thighs and hands. With a sharp, uplifting scent of menthol, bergamot and cedarwood, this men’s talcum powder offers more than just fragrance—it supports performance. Whether it’s handling workout equipment, cycling long distances or running in tough conditions, this powder works to support your routine. Thoughtfully crafted as a 100 % talc free dusting powder, this formula keeps skin dry, comfortable and ready to perform—before, during and after workouts. Suitable for all skin types and perfect for maintaining comfort in high‑sweat zones. Power your routine with confidence. Add to Basket and make this workout essential part of your fitness arsenal.
